headline: IBM Confluent Deal Puts Real Time Data At Core Of AI Story
summary: IBM, NYSE:IBM, has completed its acquisition of Confluent, adding real time data streaming to its AI and hybrid cloud portfolio. The deal is aimed at helping enterprises run AI on live operational data across on premises and cloud environments. Confluent’s technology is set to feed IBM’s AI models and automation tools with continuously flowing, governed data. IBM shares recently closed at $251.6, with the stock up 124.8% over the past 3 years and 146.2% over 5 years, and a 2.2% gain over...

headline: Higher gas prices are 'absolutely recessionary': IBM vice chair
summary: IBM (IBM) vice chair Gary Cohn joins Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi to discuss how higher oil (CL=F, BZ=F) and gas (RB=F) prices are impacting consumers, what it means for the broader economy, and where the US stands compared to the rest of the world.

headline: Datadog Stock Surges 27% in a Year: Time to Hold or Book Profits?

headline: Open Source Summit North America 2026 Schedule Showcases Next Era of AI Infrastructure, Security and Open Ecosystems
summary: The Linux Foundation, the nonprofit organization enabling mass innovation through open source, today announced the schedule for Open Source Summit + Embedded Linux Conference North America 2026 (OSS + ELC NA), taking place in Minneapolis, Minnesota, from May 18-20, 2026. This premier event serves as the essential gathering point for the global open source community to collaborate on the foundational technologies powering everything from autonomous AI agents to mission-critical industry systems.
